arts.ttl: Chelsea eye Ipswich's Delap - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Chelsea eye move for Ipswich's Liam Delap, Liverpool and Arsenal battle for Real Sociedad's Martin Zubimendi, Joshua Zirkzee's Manchester United future in doubt.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca ‘thankful’ for connection at Leicester ahead of return with Chelsea
arts.sum: Maresca led the Foxes to the Sky Bet Championship title last season before joining Chelsea on a five-year contract over the summer.

arts.ttl: ‘The best present I got last season’: Maresca reveals Leicester surprise before Chelsea move
arts.sum: Manager recalls the relationships he built at his former club and why he thinks Jamie Vardy is England’s greatest striker The way Enzo Maresca remembers it, his Leicester players did not ring the doorbell, they snuck around the back of his house and tapped on the windows. It was the end of April, late at night, the club’s promotion back into the Premier League confirmed when Leeds lost at QPR and the players could have gone anywhere to celebrate. That they came here – to be with the manager who had guided them – said everything about their collective bond. Maresca would swap Leicester for Chelsea over the summer. But as he prepares to take his new club to visit his old one on Saturday lunchtime, he was never going to blot out the emotion, to look beyond the relationships he built during the season that made him. They provide the template for what he wants at Chelsea. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca details how Leicester players gatecrashed his house at 2am after Championship win - as he prepares to head back to his former side with Chelsea
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL: Chelsea's head coach says he has 'no idea' how Foxes fans will welcome him back to the King Power Stadium on Saturday, but insists his connection with the squad was special.

arts.ttl: Papers: Ipswich striker Delap emerges as Chelsea target
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Saturday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Leicester City to Remove Main Kit Sponsor During Season?
arts.sum: Leicester City is at serious risk of losing its main sponsor during the season.

arts.ttl: Five players could miss Leicester vs Chelsea as two huge blows confirmed and new Reece James update
arts.sum: Maresca commented on Palmer pulling out of England duty saying: "To be honest, after we played Arsenal I left for one week [on holiday] so I don't know about the conversations between the club and the international teams." Maresca said: "We have, for sure, just one injured player and that is Reece [James.] Unfortunately, he felt something small and we do not want to take a risk with him at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Reece James makes injury vow after latest Chelsea setback
arts.sum: Reece James addresses his latest hamstring injury on social media.

arts.ttl: Chelsea face bittersweet nightmare scenario that could cost Man City millions despite warning
arts.sum: "I think we are close to that," said the Manchester City midfielder when asked if players could begin to strike or refuse to play. With players entitled to at least three weeks off, those at Chelsea and Manchester City will have very little time to unwind physically and mentally.

arts.ttl: Forgotten Chelsea star embarrasses Cole Palmer as Enzo Maresca sent cheeky three-word message
arts.sum: Speaking to reporters ahead of the Leicester City clash, Maresca was quizzed on Palmer's role in the Chelsea lineup and whether he could play alongside Joao Felix. Jadon Sancho has poked fun at Cole Palmer ahead of Chelsea's clash against Leicester City.
